extraction_notes: Complete extraction from 147 pages. All U-designators verified from schematic. M3 Pro-specific ICs include HDMI Cobra controller (UH700), SD card controller (UK550), and additional ATC regulators.

ics.description: Main System on Chip. BGA with PCPU, ECPU, GPU, Neural Engine, memory controller, I/O. 808-J6122 / 808-J6120.

ics.function: SVR AON — 3V8 always-on switching voltage regulator
ics.description: 30A ICC MAX multi-phase buck producing PP3V8_AON from PPBUS_AON. Phase drivers on page 35.
Slave Power Management Unit. Bucks: 5,6,7,8,10,12,13,14. LDOs: 4,5,9,9B,12,INT. Switches: SW4,SW5,SW6/7. Boost. Input: PP3V8_AON. OMIT_TABLE VDD_Z3585.
Master Power Management Unit. Bucks: 0,1,2,3,4,7,9,10,11,13. LDOs: 1-3,5,7-11,13-20,INT,RTC2. 32K clock, charger reset. Input: PP3V8_AON (VODMAN). OMIT_TABLE SBN_13024.
Main charger IC converting USB-C/MagSafe input (PPDCIN_USBC_AON) to PPBUS_AON and managing battery charging. Dual-phase buck with L5200 inductor. F5200/F5201 critical 12A fuses on output.
Produces PP5V_S2 (5.14V/5.232V BOM options) from PPBUS_AON. Iout Max=2.1A, F=1.25MHz, Startup 4.7-10.5ms.
VDD1 1V8 SWITCH. Switches PP1V8_S2 to PP1V8_S2SW. Enabled by PV001_PWR_EN.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC0
ics.description: Port controller for ATC0 (left rear). PD negotiation, CC signaling, VBUS control. Internal LDO (PP1V05_UPC0_LDO_CORE). SPI ROM for firmware. COLTRANE_CRAKE.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC1
ics.description: Port controller for ATC1 (left front). Same as UF400 for second port.
USB2 retimer (MACAW 1). Powered by PP3V25_S2_LDO, PP1V25_S2.
USB2 retimer (MACAW 0). Powered by PP3V25_S2_LDO, PP1V25_S2.
Level shifter for ATC0 retimer I2C bus. Translates between PP1V25_S2 and PP3V3_S2_LDO domains.
Level shifter for ATC1 retimer I2C bus. Translates between PP1V25_S2 and PP3V3_S2_LDO domains.

ics.function: ATC0/1 and eUSB0/1 reset level shifters
ics.description: Sequencing: 3.3V must come up at same time or before system 1.2V/1.8V
Produces PP1V2_USBC_VDDIO (1.119V). Vout=1.119V, Iout Max=0.66A.
Produces PPVDD_USBC_FIXED (0.8074V).
Produces PPVDD_USBC_VDDIO (0.8622V).
Produces PP5V_S2_UPC (5.23V). EDOS=5A, F=1.5MHz, startup <15ms. UF800/UF840 buffer options.
Secure element IC. Powered by PP3V8_AON. I2C interface.
HDMI controller IC (Cobra). Large BGA with multiple HDMI data lanes, I2C, SPI interfaces. IN PROGRESS note on page 80.
SD card reader controller. PCIe to SD interface. Powered by PP1V2_SL_LDRR, PP3V3_MAME_S60.
Produces PP0V95_MAME2W_DFCHM1 for HDMI. Vout=0.96V, ICC MAX=1.58A, OCP range 3.14-16.89A. Forced PWM F=1MHz.
Generates CHGR_RST_2N → UPC_PMU_RESET_DLO. Charger reset now takes 1.2V per PMU.
Willamette integrated WiFi/BT with 2GFEM + 5GFEM front-ends. Powered by VBAT, PP3V8_AON_WLBT, PP1V8_S2_WLBT.
Sequences display panel power rails. Controls EDP panel power discharge.
CRITICAL. Produces PP3V29 backlight feed.
CRITICAL. 3V8 feed to MDB (display).
First NAND package. Powered by PPVDN_MAME_NAND_VCC, PP1V25_MAME_NAND_VCC. FL4000 fuse.
Second NAND package. Same power as S5E0.
MagSafe connector with Q5401 MOSFET pair. MLB:516S00787, FLEX:516S00788.
Battery flex connector. APN:518S0818. SYS_DETECT circuit with D5130/U5150. BMU BOM: 632-04146.
CD3217/CD3218 MagSafe port controller. SPI ROM, USBC5 CC1/CC2, I2C address configurable. Fuse F5601 for power.
4.8V or 5V to Mabola LDO. Part of charger support 5V switchover circuit. There is a diode from VOUT to VIN.
Switchover circuit from 5V source to PP5V_S2 path.
Sovereign motion sensor. Powered by PP1V8_S2, PP3V3_S2. SPI interface.
Decoupling capacitor on PPVBUS_USBC0 (USB-C port 0 VBUS). Used as probe point for USB-C port 0 voltage measurement.
Decoupling capacitor on PPVBUS_USBC1 (USB-C port 1 VBUS). Used as probe point for USB-C port 1 voltage measurement.
Factory test point on PPBUS_AON (main power bus). Use for PPBUS_AON voltage measurement. FCT page.
Factory test point on PP3V8_AON (3.8V always-on rail). Use for PP3V8_AON voltage measurement. FCT page.
Factory test point on PP5V_S2_HOLD (5V S2 rail). Use for PP5V_S2 voltage measurement. FCT page.
